arts.ttl: Preview: Portsmouth vs. Swansea City - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Wednesday's Championship clash between Portsmouth and Swansea City, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Bookies' new predicted Championship table as Portsmouth, Derby County, Cardiff City, Hull City & Plymouth Argyle final positions predicted
arts.sum: The over-arching goal at Portsmouth is to book their place in next season’s Championship set up.

arts.ttl: Key Portsmouth development over starlet move with transfer window set to open
arts.sum: Pompey are set to park their ongoing interest in Aussie starlet Hayden Matthews for now on the eve of the January transfer window opening.

arts.ttl: 'Pretty unfair': Portsmouth boss' disappointment after travelling faithful turn on struggling Middlesbrough loanee
arts.sum: Chants of ‘Send him back, send him back’ were directed at Sammy Silvera by some of the Pompey travelling faithful at Ashton Gate.
